message:
refactor(hooks): remove all Gas Town role detection from beads

Remove crew detection as well - beads should know nothing about
Gas Town roles. All role detection (crew, polecat, witness, etc.)
should be handled by gastown.

Changes:
- parseAgentIdentity: only accepts compound format (rig/role/name)
- detectAgentFromPath: now returns nil (deprecated)

Gastown should set GT_ROLE in compound format (e.g., beads/crew/jane)
rather than relying on beads to expand simple formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
